title: Gridiron Flash
writer: Glenn Tryon, Nicholas T. Barrows, Earle Snell
actors: Eddie Quillan, Betty Furness, Grant Mitchell
plot: The Bedford College football coach cuts a deal with a talented player who also happens to be a convicted bank robber. If he stays out of trouble, the coach will get him paroled. He also convinces his pretty niece to keep him hones...
